title: TerraFirmaCraft AnvilHelper
description: Helper mod to show which button to press to make a craft on TFC Anvils.
body:
# TerraFirmaCraft AnvilHelper

Helper mod to show which button to press to make a craft on TFC Anvils.

This mod is client-side only and doesn't require to be on the server to work.

# Why?

I was making compatibility mod, and it was impossible for me to successfully
make a single anvil recipe despite having a YouTube tutorial opened on my other screen.

This mod is more meant as an accessibility tool so players are not locked out of the TFC Anvil system.
